items.title: Solana launches onchain governance and sets entry fee at 100,000 SOL staked
items.whyYouShouldCare: The introduction of on-chain governance with a high entry fee could enhance SOL's staking appeal and influence ecosystem participation.

items.title: Forward Industries jumps 17% after expanding Solana treasury to 7.55 million SOL
items.whyYouShouldCare: Forward Industries' treasury expansion signals growing institutional confidence in Solana, potentially boosting liquidity and usage within the ecosystem.

items.title: Forward Industries Shares Spike as Leading Solana Treasury Adds $38 Million in SOL
items.whyYouShouldCare: The significant increase in SOL holdings by Forward Industries reflects a strong market sentiment and could attract further investments into Solana.
